description: A Muhajir nationalist and secular political party in Pakistan, founded by Altaf Hussain in 1984. It was the London-based faction of the Muttahida Qaumi Movement, controlling influence in Karachi. The party was officially dissolved in August 2025 after years of inactivity following a 2016 crackdown.

country_links.context: The organization's last/final headquarters was in London, United Kingdom.
